# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---|---|
| latest | ✅ |
| older  | ❌ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do not** open a public issue.

Instead, report it privately via GitHub's [Security Advisories](https://github.com/TheNolle/css-minecraft-skin-viewer/security/advisories/new) or by emailing directly through [thenolle.com](https://thenolle.com).

You can expect an acknowledgement within 72 hours.
